name: Boneless Cornish Hen W/Port Orange Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. To prepare hens for stuffing, remove the skin from the backbone area and set aside.
2. Cut out the backbone, open the hen and remove all bones except the drumsticks.
3. Boil the wild rice until tender, cool, and stuff hens.
4. Close the hen with drumsticks in the air and use the skin from the backbone to wrap the hen so it will stand in the baking pan breast side up.
5. Season hens with salt and pepper.
6. Roast at 350°F for 45 minutes to 1 hour.
Sauce:
1. Combine orange juice, lemon juice, and brown sugar in a saucepan and bring to a boil.
2. Use cornstarch mixed with a little water to achieve desired thickness.
3. Stir in liqueur and keep warm.
